title: Alternative Sanding Wheel
description:
Changes the Sanding Wheel look in the "Create: SandPaper Overhaul" mod.
Also changes some other items.
body:
Changes the Sanding Wheel look in the "[Create: SandPaper Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-sandpaper-overhaul)" mod.

<details>
<summary>See all changes</summary>

- Sanding wheel has a sand-like texture. 
- Crushed iron and crushed diamond are a bit lighter.

</details>

### Here's a video:

![Comparing](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/dufFAYdT/images/9b403d4211c2791a23f2b27ec21befd02208512a.gif 'Comparison between with vs without')
